user.description: Enter the numeric lot-area code from your portal's address, e.g. 12345 for a12345.pweb.kr.

confirm.title: Confirm parking lot
confirm.description: Found: {site_name}. Continue if this is your building.

car_plates.description: Optional: track specific vehicles' parking history (입차~출차) and entry/exit events right away. This account can register discounts for any car, so this list is what narrows things down to the ones you actually care about. Leave blank to skip - addable/editable any time later via Configure.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the portal

init.description: Track specific vehicles' parking history (입차~출차). This account can register discounts for any car, so this list is what narrows the calendar down to the ones you actually care about.

register_discount.name: Register discount
register_discount.description: Registers a discount for a currently-parked vehicle.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The parking management system (site) to register the discount with.

car_no.name: Car number
car_no.description: The vehicle's license plate as shown in the portal.

discount_type.name: Discount type
discount_type.description: Pick from the confirmed site's two commonly-used types, or type a custom ID if yours differ - see the registration-status sensor's "available_discount_types" attribute for this site's full catalog.

memo.name: Memo
memo.description: Optional note to attach to the registration.

entry_date.name: Entry date
entry_date.description: Date the vehicle entered. If left blank, both yesterday and today are searched.

list_unregistered_vehicles.name: List unregistered vehicles
list_unregistered_vehicles.description: Lists currently-parked vehicles with no discount registered yet.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The parking management system (site) to search.

days.name: Days
days.description: How many days back (including today) to search. Higher values take longer.
